title: toona ciliata var. pilipetala
intro: Toona ciliata var. pilipetala, also known as the Philippine mahogany or Filipino mahogany, is a plant species in the family Meliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various herbal remedies, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Toona ciliata var. pilipetala include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be found in traditional folk medicine in some parts of Asia and the Pacific.
